prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-103 Overcurrent device selection & coordination within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The observed field condition is: missing AFCI/GFCI where required. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T1 E-103 Measurement & estimation
